title: Warm Spicy Saudi Arabian Chicken Kebabs
description: A fatty and snappy weeknight Saudi Arabian dish featuring chicken, spices, and a sweet surprise, this recipe is nut-free friendly and perfect for a quick dinner, it does not actually include mars bar or beurre-monte as those ingredients are not typically used in traditional Saudi Arabian cuisine
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
Brush the chicken with honey during the last minute of cooking.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
